title: lithocarpus calophyllus
intro: Lithocarpus calophyllus, also known as the Yellow Walnut or Red Walnut, is a species of deciduous tree native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus calophyllus have been studied for their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to protect against various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Lithocarpus calophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin conditions.
